content: Responses from forms are stored here in a connected database. To analyze data with AI, open a specific form and click 'Ask AI'.

comment.text: Informational text in the Info Panel explaining where form responses are stored and how to use the AI analysis feature.

usage.context: ); const aiDescription = useMemo(() => { if (aiConnected) { if (isDone) return t("InfoPanel:FormRoomAIReadyDescriptionFolder"); if (isFile) return t("InfoPanel:FormRoomAIReadyDescriptionFile"); return t("InfoPanel:FormRoomAIReadyDescriptionRoom"); } if (!externalDbEnabled) return t("InfoPanel:FormRoomConnectDatabase");
